nasb.text: For those who guide this people are leading them astray; And those who are guided by them are brought to confusion.

esv.text: for those who guide this people have been leading them astray, and those who are guided by them are swallowed up.

cnv.text: 因為那些領導這人民的，使他們走錯了路； 那些被領導的，都必一片混亂。

ccb.text: 这些带领者使百姓步入歧途、 走向灭亡。

csbs.text: 因为引导这百姓的使他们迷失， 而被引导的都陷入混乱。
